conversations.say: Graham, you want ledger patterns for market intelligence. I will consider your offer to settle the shop debt, but only if we maintain strict boundaries around customer privacy and avoid forced conclusions.
conversations.offer: A bounded look at transaction patterns without exposing customer identities.
conversations.request: Full debt settlement on clean terms.

conversations.say: Morgan, your message proposed terms for dating the private habit's shift using my ledger. I am willing to discuss the pattern under our strict privacy agreement.
conversations.offer: Banded transaction comparison to help date the ledger shift.
conversations.request: A binding commitment not to call any customer R or expose local neighbors.

conversations.say: Inez, outsiders like Morgan and Graham are circling the bodega records. We need to lock in our shared boundary to protect Dee and our delivery routes before outside pressure mounts.
conversations.offer: Our agreed timeline consistency and mutual support.
conversations.request: Active protection for neighborhood delivery routes and customer privacy.

public_statement: A recurring routine across fifteen years is not a single person standing at the counter, and my ledger records several incompatible collectors rather than one fixed legend.

commitments.promise: Keep timeline consistent and protect local customers from outside exposure.
Provide bounded ledger access without forced conclusions in exchange for debt settlement.
Restrict ledger viewing strictly to transaction patterns for dating the shift.

goal_progress: Negotiated bounded ledger access and debt settlement terms with Graham Pike.
Responded to Morgan Shaw regarding safe dating of the ledger change.
Solidified local protection boundary with Inez Baptiste against outside investigative pressure.
reasoning_summary: Rafi Calderón coordinates with Graham (C12) on debt settlement, Morgan (C14) on ledger dating terms, and Inez (C16) on community protection, maintaining balance across multi-collector and human habit interpretations.
